generated_oml:
instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Wheel, Chassis, StructuralElement
]

instance Wheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Wheel component of the automotive vehicle"
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Chassis component of the automotive vehicle"
]

instance StructuralElement : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural element of the automotive vehicle"
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring rotational speed of vehicle wheels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring acceleration forces in the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance StrainGaugeSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring structural strain on chassis and structural elements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData StrainDataTransmitted
]

instance WheelSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerometerSensor
]

instance StrainDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StrainGaugeSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wheel speed data collected from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, SimulationEngine
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time acceleration data collected from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, SimulationEngine
]

instance StrainData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time strain data collected from structural elements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StrainDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, Optimizer
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the automotive vehicle from CAD"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model described by differential equations for mechanical dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine, FaultDetector
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model for system physics of the automotive vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Optimizer, StateEstimator
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for calibrating model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for simulating vehicle behavior using models and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in the vehicle system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating current state of the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing vehicle performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller for real-time monitoring and supervisory control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of Physical Twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, SafetyCorrectiveAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection service for the vehicle system"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight, FaultCorrectiveAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service for the vehicle system"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimatedInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for vehicle performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationOpportunityInsight, OptimizationAction
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration service using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected fault in vehicle system components"
]

instance StateEstimatedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current state estimation of the vehicle system"
]

instance OptimizationOpportunityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Opportunity for optimizing vehicle performance"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety-related performance violation detected"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted behavior of the vehicle under current conditions"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration status of the vehicle models"
]

instance FaultCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated corrective action for detected faults"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment to vehicle parameters for optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Corrective action initiated by human operator for safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
